textByHashes.340cc8997b1dac8d5dbe98436250965f206ca780: Arr? Be ye wantin' te go on account with our gang o' fillibusters?
textByHashes.e2d61a45774331b987e1966d6c9f24c8fb21c116: The powder monkey be takin' a caulk after gettin' rowdy on bumboo, so there be plenty of room for ye.
textByHashes.9789bc024320ee713b574050db7fc4bb8a30964c: Wanna buy some clothes? Good quality, none of yer rags.
textByHashes.1fcee1918898b441209f861b2d392c956d238578: Then what are you doin' in my shop? Move along.
textByHashes.dee94a5b22522196d01e4c69f6ef41900f033aab: It's to put your head through.
textByHashes.3d8b57b8539cad33ac7b16080e0ff2c1f67e18d8: Oh! It seems as if I must have slipped while cleaning it and put a bit of a hole in the front.
textByHashes.0b9870ac8420ccefb4179c9beef52db1b014fa7a: If I say yes will you buy it?
textByHashes.fd37f04fd8403a7a71d92b7e4b89add4b934f757: Then no, I was not cleaning it with a blood-covered scimitar.
textByHashes.cd5c1683a11c256b6a80b5681b94bad184ef6e71: Look, do you want in on this or not?
textByHashes.f008edf3ac586dd4a777b9f8822fc93a365e420d: Would you buy it if it was?
textByHashes.6a6706f85d0eef648af202a82d3506fe417ff05d: If I couldn't would you still give me the money?
textByHashes.4d1aa937ab20e29b4a86f8a7538a26385aa99593: Dunno. There are a load of islands out this way, and a lot of them have little bits and pieces like this scattered around.
textByHashes.1c30653e238d3d997e36204c37400a6d21ab4077: The way I see it, there must have been some people out here at one point, then they went away.
